package rulecoverage

func PositiveDroppedError() string {
    ruleID := "dropped_error"
    family := "errors"
    severity := "warning"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Blank identifier assignments that discard an err-like value."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
